news:news.news:title: Tensions rise globally as the US focuses on Iran's Kharg Island, Russia expels a British diplomat, and a curfew is imposed in Nigeria after violence.
news:news.news:keywords: US-Iran relations, Russia-UK diplomatic tensions, Nigeria violence and curfews, Myanmar political developments, international incidents and responses

news:news.news:title: Brent crude prices are surging amid geopolitical tensions, while US border businesses face challenges due to decreased Canadian tourism.
news:news.news:keywords: oil price fluctuations, impact of Iran war on markets, US border business challenges, housing shortage solutions, minimum wage increase discussions

news:news.news:title: Apple celebrates its 50th anniversary while Xbox prepares for its upcoming games showcase in June.
news:news.news:keywords: Apple's 50th anniversary, Xbox games showcase, Vivo smartphone launch, KitchenAid mixer redesign, Steve Jobs' impact on tech

news:news.news:title: UConn's dramatic comeback against Duke secured their spot in the Final Four, while NFL teams are preparing for potential changes in officiating and coaching staff.
news:news.news:keywords: UConn Final Four victory, NFL referee negotiations, Celtics playoff performance, NC State coaching changes, Mets early season struggles

news:news.news:title: Recent studies reveal significant advancements in pain management, cosmic phenomena, and the effects of microgravity on reproduction.
news:news.news:keywords: non-drug therapies for arthritis, mysterious cosmic explosions, effects of microgravity on reproduction, black holes and star formation, sugar substitutes and health risks

news:news.news:title: The ongoing conflict in Iran continues to escalate, impacting regional stability and prompting various international responses.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict updates, international political developments, economic responses to fuel prices, protests against political leaders, cultural theft and art crime

news:news.news:title: US churches are increasingly developing affordable housing on underutilized land as border businesses suffer from reduced Canadian tourism amid rising oil prices and economic challenges.
news:news.news:keywords: affordable housing initiatives, impact of political tensions on businesses, oil price fluctuations due to geopolitical events

news:news.news:title: AI continues to influence various sectors, including music and social media, while ongoing sales events highlight consumer technology trends.
news:news.news:keywords: AI in music industry, Bluesky AI feed customization, Amazon Big Spring Sale highlights, historical impact of Macintosh, Apple App Store antitrust issues

news:news.news:title: UConn's dramatic last-second victory over Duke secured their place in the Final Four, while the NFL faces challenges with referee negotiations and player trades.
news:news.news:keywords: UConn's Elite Eight victory analysis, Final Four predictions, NFL referee negotiations, Rick Pitino's new coaching deal, Gary Woodland's comeback win

news:news.news:title: New research reveals potential health risks of erythritol, while breakthroughs in pain therapy and human origins reshape scientific understanding.
news:news.news:keywords: health risks of sugar substitutes, quantum computing breakthroughs, pain management without opioids, new cholesterol guidelines, human evolution discoveries

news:news.news:title: UConn Shocks Duke with Last-Second Win, Secures Final Four Spot Amid Rising Oil Prices
